chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application NO.S-742 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of letter of trial court as flagged-A. 10.07.2025 Mr. Nawab Ali Pittafi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- Learned counsel appearing on behalf of applicant has stated that matter has been compounded vide order dated 23.06.2025 in the Court of Judicial Magistrate, Daharki, in criminal case No.226/2023. Matter is already disposed of. Assigned to office record. JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
